description: Create invoices, register payments, create credit notes
preflight: PUT /company/{id} with bankAccountNumber to register bank account (REQUIRED before invoicing)
GET /customer or POST /customer to ensure customer exists
GET /invoice/paymentType to find payment type IDs (for payment tasks)
endpoints: POST /invoice — body: {invoiceDate, invoiceDueDate, orders:[{customer:{id}, orderDate, deliveryDate, orderLines:[{description, count, unitPriceExcludingVatCurrency, vatType:{id:3}}]}]}
common_errors: Company must have bankAccountNumber before invoice creation
GET /invoice REQUIRES invoiceDateFrom and invoiceDateTo params
Invoice body needs 'orders' array wrapping orderLines, each order needs customer, orderDate, deliveryDate
vatType MUST be set on every order line
tips: For credit notes, the invoice already exists — search for it. For payments, use negative paidAmount to reverse. FOREIGN CURRENCY: If invoice is in EUR/USD/etc, register_payment needs BOTH amount (NOK equivalent) and paidAmountCurrency (foreign currency amount). Calculate NOK amount = foreign amount × exchange rate. For exchange rate difference tasks, the payment amount in NOK differs from the invoice NOK amount — create a voucher for the exchange rate gain/loss (account 8060 gain / 8160 loss).
